'''Willks''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]], and the [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmate]] of [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on [[Aguarl 3]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces.

==Appearances==
*[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] {{1st}}
